description: SSRF: user-controlled URL from $_GET flows to file_get_contents() (dual Source+Sink label)

expected.notes: $_GET['url'] flows to file_get_contents($url) — file_get_contents has dual Source+Sink(SSRF) labels
file_get_contents response assigned to $content and echoed — SSRF-fetched content flows to echo (XSS-like response sink)
